notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias

coachLine: Sim-optimal for 10s rotation vs squishies: first spike lands around minute 12 (Spectral Schematics), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +13.9% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

augments.name: Mana Catalyst
augments.note: mana restoration from damage; resource economy not in the combat model

augments.name: Arcane Engine
augments.note: stacking movement speed; cadence and uptime unobservable

augments.name: Infinite Obliteration
augments.note: projectile range/speed/slow utility; no damage change

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 64 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 0% of our best core on sustained auto DPS. The winrate is earned, not luck.

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 686 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +33% more one-combo burst: try Spectral Schematics over Azure Core (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 23 — about 1,003 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees 2.1× the 10s rotation damage: try Spectral Schematics over Timewarp (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 34% of its bite; you give up 25% of your damage.
